description: Configure the SeisComP 'exec' module to automatically trigger a custom shell script whenever a new seismic Origin is received. Create an executable bash script at /home/ga/scripts/log_origin.sh that accepts the Origin PublicID as its first argument and appends a line to /home/ga/origin_audit.log in the format '[Timestamp] New Origin: [PublicID]'. The 'exec' module must be configured to subscribe to the 'LOCATION' messaging group, trigger on messages of class 'Origin', and be enabled and running in the background.
